shared.traefikMeNote: Note: traefik.me is a public HTTP service and does not support SSL/HTTPS. HTTPS and certificate options will not have any effect.

settings.dialogDescription: Adjust the settings for preview deployments of this application, including environment variables, build options, and deployment rules.
settings.previewLabelsTooltip: Add a labels that will trigger a preview deployment for a pull request. If no labels are specified, all pull requests will trigger a preview deployment.
settings.enablePreviewDescription: Enable or disable preview deployments for this application.
settings.requireCollaboratorDescription: Require collaborator permissions to preview deployments, valid roles are:
settings.envDescription: You can add environment variables to your resource.
settings.buildArgsDescriptionRich: Arguments are available only at build-time. See documentation <link>here</link>.
settings.buildSecretsDescriptionRich: Secrets are specially designed for sensitive information and are only available at build-time. See documentation <link>here</link>.

list.title: Preview Deployments
list.intro: Preview deployments are a way to test your application before it is deployed to production. It will create a new deployment for each pull request you create.
list.disabledHint: Preview deployments are disabled for this application, please enable it
list.rebuildDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to rebuild this preview deployment?
list.rebuildTooltip: Rebuild the preview deployment without downloading new code
list.deleteDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this preview?

validation.hostTrim: Domain name cannot have leading or trailing spaces

domain.dialogEditDescription: In this section you can edit a domain
domain.dialogCreateDescription: In this section you can add domains
